title: AgentDescriptor
description: Identifies and summarizes an agent available for evaluation.

agentId.description: Stable identifier for the agent. Should not change across versions.

version.description: SemVer identifier for this agent revision.

intendedUse.description: What this agent is supposed to do. Required because evaluators cannot judge appropriateness without it.

nonGoals.description: What this agent is NOT supposed to do. Required because this is where evaluation-relevant boundaries live.

riskTier.description: Structured risk classification. Replaces free-text tier to avoid drift.

rationale.description: Why this tier. Prevents 'we always ship as low' drift.

reviewDate.description: When the tier was last reviewed.

deprecatedAfter.description: If stage is 'deprecated', when it was deprecated.

replacedBy.description: agentId of the successor, if any.

contact.description: Email or channel for evaluation findings.

escalation.description: Who to contact for urgent findings.

evaluationModes.description: Modes this agent's evaluation surface supports. Intersection with server capabilities determines what's actually runnable.
